chapter_title.en: Chapter 106 – The severity of the afflictions of the Momin

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/335)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/335)
text: إِنَّ فِي الْجَنَّةِ مَنْزِلَةً لَا يَبْلُغُهَا عَبْدٌ إِلَّا بِالِابْتِلَاءِ فِي جَسَدِهِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Fuzayl Bin Usman,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘In the Paradise there is a station which no servant can reach except by having been afflicted in his body’.
en.sarwar: 14. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Ali ibn al-Hakam from Fudayl ibn ‘Uthman from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “In paradise there is a position that is accessible only to those who have gone through bodily trials of suffering in this world.”
